sentence: The curious child asked endless questions about the stars.
chinese: adj. 好奇的；好打听的；奇特的，不寻常的

sentence: Her curiosity about ancient cultures led her to study archaeology.
chinese: n. 好奇心；求知欲；奇物，珍品

chinese: n. 货币，通货；流通，流行

chinese: adj. 累积的，渐增的

sentence: The average temperature in July is around 30 degrees Celsius.
chinese: n. 平均数；一般水平 adj. 平均的；普通的，平常的 v. 平均为

chinese: n. 奖，奖品；奖学金；裁定 v. 授予，颁发；判给

chinese: adj. 知道的，意识到的；有…意识的

chinese: v. 包含，需要；使卷入，牵涉；使参与

sentence: Please reverse the car into the parking space.
